breadth.panoramaHint: View today's industry breadth heatmap grouped by sectors

breadth.industryClickHint: Click to view realtime stocks in this industry
breadth.industryStocksInlineNote: Shown after clicking an industry; realtime details only, no historical K-line
breadth.industryStocksNoData: No realtime stock details available for this industry
breadth.thresholdHint: When market breadth approaches or exceeds a specific threshold (e.g., 85%), it may signal a cyclical peak; when it nears or falls below another threshold (e.g., 15%), it may signal a cyclical bottom.
